input.target_audience: VP Sales at B2B SaaS companies 100-500 employees
input.key_message: Expert-level personalized outreach at the scale of a template — without the 90-day SDR ramp
customer_outcomes: Rippling cut SDR ramp time from 90 to 44 days
Gong increased positive reply rates by 34%

meta_variants.primary_text: If your SDRs are still taking 90 days to ramp, you're losing a full quarter of pipeline from every new hire. lele cuts ramp time in half by giving new reps expert-trained sequences from day one — not generic templates.
meta_variants.headline: Book 40% more meetings

meta_variants.primary_text: Rippling's SDR team went from 90-day ramp to 44 days. Same headcount. Different playbook. lele sequences are trained from actual expert observation — not AI-generated templates.
meta_variants.headline: Rippling ramps SDRs in 44 days

meta_variants.primary_text: The top 1% of SDR teams aren't using better templates. They're using better judgment — encoded into every email, every sequence, every follow-up. That's what lele captures and runs automatically.
meta_variants.headline: Why top SDR teams outperform

meta_variants.primary_text: Build a 50-lead targeted outreach campaign in under 2 hours — including research, personalized emails, and a 4-touch sequence. lele does the research and writes the emails. You approve and send.
meta_variants.headline: 50 leads, 2 hours, 0 templates

google_variants.description_1: lele trains AI agents from real expert GTM behavior — not generic templates. Your reps ramp faster and book more meetings.
google_variants.description_2: Rippling cut SDR ramp from 90 to 44 days. See the playbook that made it happen. Free 14-day trial.

google_variants.description_1: Build targeted outreach campaigns in hours — expert research, personalized emails, and multi-touch sequences built automatically.
google_variants.description_2: Used by fast-growing B2B SaaS teams. Gong, Rippling, and 200+ sales teams trust lele for outbound. Try free.

output.recommended_meta: Run the pain variant first — it has the highest personal resonance for a VP Sales who's actively watching ramp time metrics. The social proof variant is the strongest A/B challenger once you have baseline data.
output.recommended_google: Run the pain_and_value variant with keyword insertion in headline_1 — Quality Score will be higher and it speaks directly to searchers in active evaluation mode.

ab_test_pairings.hypothesis: Pain-led copy will have higher CTR with cold audiences; social proof will have higher conversion rate for warm retargeting. Run cold:pain, warm:social_proof as a segmented test.
